packageRules.description: vllm-semantic-router chart is pinned to 0.2.0. Chart 0.3.0 restructures the values schema (canonical-v0.3 providers/routing/global) and its component defaults set pullPolicy: Never, which breaks the router on any fresh node (ErrImageNeverPull -> every `model: MoM` request 404s). Renovate previously bumped this past a plain code comment (c00892eb) and the breakage only surfaced on the next from-scratch cluster. Re-enable in the same PR that migrates infrastructure/base/vllm-semantic-router/helmrelease.yaml to the 0.3 schema.
